pi_items.source: File existence verified via setup_task.sh and task_utils.sh (restore_chinook_odb function copies from /opt/libreoffice_base_samples/chinook.odb)
Verified via Chinook SQLite schema inspection - Artist table exists with ArtistId as PRIMARY KEY
Verified via Chinook SQLite schema - Artist table has ArtistId PRIMARY KEY
Verified via Chinook SQLite schema - Album table exists with ArtistId foreign key
Verified via Chinook SQLite schema - Album.ArtistId REFERENCES artists(ArtistId)
Verified via Chinook SQLite schema - Album table exists with AlbumId as PRIMARY KEY
Verified via Chinook SQLite schema - Album table has AlbumId PRIMARY KEY
Verified via Chinook SQLite schema - Track table exists with AlbumId foreign key
Verified via Chinook SQLite schema - Track.AlbumId REFERENCES albums(AlbumId)
Verified via Chinook SQLite schema - Customer table exists with CustomerId as PRIMARY KEY
Verified via Chinook SQLite schema - Customer table has CustomerId PRIMARY KEY
Verified via Chinook SQLite schema - Invoice table exists with CustomerId foreign key
Verified via Chinook SQLite schema - Invoice.CustomerId REFERENCES customers(CustomerId)
Direct SQLite query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM artists returned 275 rows in chinook.db
Direct SQLite query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM albums returned 347 rows in chinook.db
Direct SQLite query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tracks returned 3503 rows in chinook.db
Direct SQLite query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers returned 59 rows in chinook.db
Direct SQLite query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM invoices returned 412 rows in chinook.db

Code analysis of install_libreoffice_base.sh shows download from lerocha/chinook-database GitHub repository. Media data is real (from Apple iTunes); customer/employee data is fictitious but realistically formatted.

privileged_info_summary: The define_relationships task operates on the authentic Chinook database from lerocha/chinook-database GitHub repository. The database contains 275 artists, 347 albums, 3503 tracks, 59 customers, and 412 invoices. The task requires creating three foreign key relationships in LibreOffice Base: (1) Artist.ArtistId → Album.ArtistId, (2) Album.AlbumId → Track.AlbumId, and (3) Customer.CustomerId → Invoice.CustomerId. All table names and column names in the metadata are verified to exist in the Chinook database schema. The database is partially real (media-related data from Apple iTunes library) and partially synthetic (customer/employee data with realistic formatting).
